title: Normal Operations — False-Positive Discipline Test
description: A benign shift containing deliberately tempting co-occurrences: a confined-space entry with a proper multi-point gas test and stable readings, hot work far from classified zones, and a calibration-induced pressure spike that is fully explained by maintenance context. A naive alert-on-everything system would flag all three. Ground truth: zero hazard windows.
narrative: The scenario that measures restraint. KAVACH is scored on false positives here — the metric that determines whether operators trust the system or mute it.

permits.title: Battery 3 basement — annual structural inspection

gas_test.detail: Multi-point test: entrance CO 9 ppm, mid-chamber CO 11 ppm, rear CO 10 ppm, O2 20.9% throughout, H2S nil. Continuous monitor issued to crew.

isolations: Adjacent gas-main leg confirmed isolated and purged

work_orders.title: PT-GM-103 transmitter calibration check
work_orders.notes: Scheduled annual calibration. Test pressure applied via hand pump — readings during 10:00–10:05 window are test artefacts, not process values.

events.title: Gas test GT-1130 for CSE-2094: PASS (multi-point)
events.detail: Entrance, mid-chamber and rear all tested. Continuous personal monitor issued to entry crew.

events.title: Permit CSE-2094 activated — Confined Space Entry, Battery 3 basement
events.detail: Annual structural inspection. Crew of 3. Adjacent gas-main leg isolated and purged.

events.title: Gas test GT-1131 for HW-2102: PASS
Permit HW-2102 activated — Hot Work, Maintenance Workshop
events.detail: Bracket fabrication welding. Fire watch posted. Nearest classified zone > 150 m.

events.title: WO-8820 started — PT-GM-103 calibration
events.detail: Hand-pump test pressure will be applied. Readings 10:00–10:05 are test artefacts.

events.title: WO-8820 completed — PT-GM-103 back in service
events.detail: Calibration within tolerance. As-found/as-left records filed.

events.title: Brief CO blip at GD-BPP-209 during tanker loading
events.detail: Known short venting during by-product tanker connection; dispersed within minutes. Standard operating condition.

events.title: Permits CSE-2094 and HW-2102 closed out
events.detail: Work completed. Areas restored, sign-offs filed.
